posts.body: When meeting the requirement for a Noble. Is it the total of Coins + Cards, or just Cards.
Just cards. The square shape of the icons on the nobles is a reminder of that.

Rule reference:
The noble tiles
The noble tiles are visible in the middle of the table. At the end of their turn, a player automatically receives the visit from a noble if that player has the amount of bonuses (and only bonuses) required...

(Note "bonuses", not "tokens".)
